testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'SHIVARAJNAGAROO', ip: '192.168.224.1'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'SHIVARAJNAGAROO', ip: '192.168.224.1'

testcase.name: verify_account_registration
